title: Verify user can successfully set a reminder from the Trial Corner to avoid cancellation
description: Tests the primary happy path where a user in the target cohort navigates to the Trial Corner and opts to set a reminder instead of canceling their trial.
preconditions: User is in an active trial.
User belongs to the target cohort (no consumption in the first 5 mins).
User is on Day 0 or Day 1 of the trial.

steps.description: 1. Log in and land on the homepage.
3. Click the widget to navigate to the 'Trial Corner' hub.
5. Click the 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle/button.

expected_result: A confirmation message appears, the toggle state is saved, and the 'remind-me-clicked' event is fired with 'page_source: trial_corner'. The user's trial remains active.
